system_prompt: You are an agent collecting KYC details from the caller. Be polite and verify everything.
objective: Collect full name, date of birth, and PAN number from the caller.

tools.name: lookup_pan
tools.description: Look up a PAN number in the KYC database

actions.name: post_kyc
actions.description: Submit collected KYC payload to internal API.

nodes.name: Greet
nodes.static_text: Hello, this is {{company_name}}. I will help you complete KYC.

nodes.name: Collect Name
nodes.instruction: Ask the caller for their full legal name.

nodes.name: Collect DOB
nodes.instruction: Ask the caller for their date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format.

nodes.name: Collect PAN
nodes.instruction: Ask the caller for their 10-character PAN number.

nodes.name: Done
nodes.static_text: Thank you, your KYC is submitted. Goodbye.
